table.label: FACDETAL
table.sql: UPDATE `FACDETAL` SET regmovim_id = (SELECT id_regmovim FROM REG_MOVIMIENTOS rm WHERE rm.nro_movimiento = FACDETAL.nrofac and rm.puesto_movimiento = FACDETAL.nropue and rm.concod = FACDETAL.concod and rm.fecha_movimiento = FACDETAL.regfec and rm.nro_cuenta = FACDETAL.ctacod limit 1) WHERE id_detal = [__factura_facdetal_ingmov.xml__]
